testcase.name: test_market_universe

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should have 'stocks' field assert 'stocks' in {'asia': [{'name': 'Toyota Motor Corp', 'region': 'Asia', 'sector': 'Consumer Cyclical', 'symbol': '7203.T'}, {'name': 'Sony Group Corp', 'region': 'Asia', 'sector': 'Technology', 'symbol': '6758.T'}, {'name': 'SoftBank Group', 'region': 'Asia', 'sector': 'Communication Services', 'symbol': '9984.T'}, {'name': 'Nippon Telegraph & Telephone', 'region': 'Asia', 'sector': 'Communication Services', 'symbol': '9432.T'}, {'name': 'Mitsubishi UFJ Financial', 'region': 'Asia', 'sector': 'Financial Services', 'symbol': '8306.T'}, {'name': 'Keyence Corp', 'region': 'Asia', 'sector': 'Technology', 'symbol': '6861.T'}, ...], 'commodities': [{'name': 'Gold Futures', 'symbol': 'GC=F', 'type': 'Precious Metals'}, {'name': 'Silver Futures', 'symbol': 'SI=F', 'type': 'Precious Metals'}, {'name': 'Platinum Futures', 'symbol': 'PL=F', 'type': 'Precious Metals'}, {'name': 'Palladium Futures', 'symbol': 'PA=F', 'type': 'Precious Metals'}, {'name': 'Crude Oil WTI', 'symbol': 'CL=F', 'type': 'Energy'}, {'name': 'Brent Crude Oil', 'symbol': 'BZ=F', 'type': 'Energy'}, ...], 'europe': [{'name': 'Air Liquide', 'region': 'Europe', 'sector': 'Basic Materials', 'symbol': 'AI.PA'}, {'name': 'Airbus SE', 'region': 'Europe', 'sector': 'Industrials', 'symbol': 'AIR.PA'}, {'name': 'BNP Paribas', 'region': 'Europe', 'sector': 'Financial Services', 'symbol': 'BNP.PA'}, {'name': 'Carrefour SA', 'region': 'Europe', 'sector': 'Consumer Defensive', 'symbol': 'CA.PA'}, {'name': 'AXA SA', 'region': 'Europe', 'sector': 'Financial Services', 'symbol': 'CS.PA'}, {'name': 'Vinci SA', 'region': 'Europe', 'sector': 'Industrials', 'symbol': 'DG.PA'}, ...], 'forex': [{'base': 'EUR', 'name': 'EUR/USD', 'quote': 'USD', 'symbol': 'EURUSD=X'}, {'base': 'GBP', 'name': 'GBP/USD', 'quote': 'USD', 'symbol': 'GBPUSD=X'}, {'base': 'USD', 'name': 'USD/JPY', 'quote': 'JPY', 'symbol': 'USDJPY=X'}, {'base': 'AUD', 'name': 'AUD/USD', 'quote': 'USD', 'symbol': 'AUDUSD=X'}, {'base': 'USD', 'name': 'USD/CAD', 'quote': 'CAD', 'symbol': 'USDCAD=X'}, {'base': 'USD', 'name': 'USD/CHF', 'quote': 'CHF', 'symbol': 'USDCHF=X'}, ...], ...}

testcase.failure: tests/test_options_earnings.py:316: in test_market_universe assert "stocks" in data, "Response should have 'stocks' field" E AssertionError: Response should have 'stocks' field E
